This entire park is dotted with large pecan trees. Many are in poor shape, but still producing nuts. Not the largest nuts or thinnest shells but tasty. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: October-November.

Lots of fruit in late summer. I'm usually home, feel free to come to my door (the green house) and ask to pick, I'll join you happily. Many of the trees are behind the house. Access: Permitted by owner.
Falling Fruit access: Permitted by owner.
